stem: A HR analytics study surveys 40 staff members and observes 19 positive outcomes out of 40 (47.5%). Estimate the true employee turnover rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.475. Wilson 95% CI: [0.3294, 0.625]. Point estimate: 0.4772.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
